response.original_title: Mi canto se meció en el vacío
response.overview: Oteiza is no longer with us. But his sculptures remain. Six of them rest in the city of Pamplona, ​​contemplating streets and passersby who walk by without noticing them, without pausing. This documentary seeks to give voice to these pieces, almost in a literal sense: Oteiza's words, recorded in his vast sound archive, return with all their power. They return with poignant disquisitions, crystalline verses, metaphysical crossroads. They return to where they were born: to life. They return to portray a profound soul, always faithful to the depth of his thought.
response.tagline: Oteiza is no longer with us. But his sculptures remain.
response.title: Mi canto se meció en el vacío
